description: Phase 41 scan_invariants_composition: explicit morphism composition checks against atom values from config/invariants.json. Complements P39 (foundation relations) with non-foundation compositional identities: sigma·tau == 48 (R24+9 monoidal — 45 claims + 3 on_demand scanners = 48 scanner-related units), phi^tau == 16 (R24+8 cartesian closed — P1..P16 pre-schema phases). Proves F preserves products and exponentials live. Gate: checks_failed == 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_invariants_composition.json ] && jq -r "if .checks_failed == 0 and .checks_passed >= 2 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_invariants_composition.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
